title: CT12.N05 completed discharge record — C4 — unsaturated branch
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT12.N05, the certificate node “C4 — unsaturated branch” of tactic CT12 (Peeling loop). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT12.N05. It must be exactly `CT12`, selecting Peeling loop (loop) as the tactic that owns the certificate step “C4 — unsaturated branch” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “C4 — unsaturated branch”. It must be exactly `CT12.N05` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT12.N05 within tactic CT12 (Peeling loop). It must be exactly 5, matching the N05 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT12.N05. It must be exactly `validated`, meaning that the node's certificate, trigger, or other validation obligation has been checked for the certificate obligation “C4 — unsaturated branch”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT12.N05. The array must contain `A-Cert`, `S-Comp`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “C4 — unsaturated branch”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `A-Cert` to occur in CT12.N05's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records for the obligation “C4 — unsaturated branch”.

Requires `S-Comp` to occur in CT12.N05's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion for the obligation “C4 — unsaturated branch”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT12.N05 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: A-Cert (certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence); S-Comp (comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `A-Cert` evidence instance at CT12.N05. It must be exactly `A-Cert`, identifying the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records; the same instance must supply certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Comp` evidence instance at CT12.N05. It must be exactly `S-Comp`, identifying the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion; the same instance must supply comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence.

certificate.description: Terminal certificate emitted when CT12.N05 closes its branch. It must be exactly `C4`, the framework's certificate for quantitative comparison or capacity contradiction; the node's `A-Cert` instance and companion contracts must validate “C4 — unsaturated branch”.

statement.informal: Validate or verify: C4 — unsaturated branch

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
